absorption: ASK absorption at vPOC; positive delta (+29) fails to lift price against offers.
dom_observation: Large stacked ask wall starting from 60900, indicating strong selling pressure above.
reasoning: Fiyat, vPOC seviyesinde pozitif deltaya ragmen yukselemiyor ve yukarida buyuk bir satis duvari tarafindan absorbe ediliyor, bu da saticilarin kontrolunu gosteriyor.
